code: import"./styles/MyBooks.css";import{useEffect,useState}from"react";import axios from"axios";import{jsx as _jsx,jsxs as _jsxs}from"react/jsx-runtime";function MyBooks(){const[transactions,setTransactions]=useState([]);const[loading,setLoading]=useState(true);const userId=localStorage.getItem("userId");useEffect(()=>{if(!userId)return;axios.get(`http://localhost:5000/api/transactions/student/${userId}`).then(res=>{setTransactions(res.data);setLoading(false);}).catch(err=>{console.log(err);setLoading(false);});},[userId]);const handleReturn=async transactionId=>{try{const res=await axios.post("http://localhost:5000/api/transactions/return",{transactionId});alert(res.data.fine>0?`Returned. Fine: ₹${res.data.fine}`:"Book returned successfully!");window.location.reload();}catch(err){alert("Error returning book");}};if(loading)return/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("p",{children:"Loading your books..."});return/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs("div",{className:"mybooks-page",children:[/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("h1",{className:"mybooks-title",children:"\uD83D\uDCDA My Borrowed Books"}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs("div",{className:"mybooks-grid",children:[transactions.length===0&&/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("p",{children:"You have not borrowed any books yet."}),transactions.map(t=>/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs("div",{className:"mybook-card",children:[/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("img",{src:t.book.cover,alt:t.book.title}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("h3",{children:t.book.title}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("p",{children:t.book.author}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs("span",{className:"due",children:["Due: ",new Date(t.dueDate).toLocaleDateString()]}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs("span",{className:"status",children:["Status: ",t.status]}),t.status==="issued"&&/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("button",{onClick:()=>handleReturn(t._id),children:"Return Book"}),t.status==="returned"&&/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs("span",{className:"fine",children:["Fine: \u20B9",t.fine]})]},t._id))]})]});}export default MyBooks;
